positive: A majestic, stylized biomechanical fox silhouette merging with crystalline constellations. The composition should feature strong central symmetry. Use a high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, luminous cyan, electric violet, and matte gold accents. The style should be a blend of sacred geometry, Art Deco etching, and neon linework, giving it a clean, graphic, and high-fashion feel. Detail must include filigree patterns, flowing geometric tails, and stylized celestial elements like orbits and nebulae contained within sharp borders. Ideal for a seamless, repeating apparel print.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, border, frame, low resolution, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, duplicate, muddy colors
